testcase.name: test_mission_creation_increments_prospects_challenge

failure.message: AssertionError: progress not incremented (before=0, after=0) assert 0 == (0 + 1)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_missions.py:320: in test_mission_creation_increments_prospects_challenge assert after == before + 1, f"progress not incremented (before={before}, after={after})" E AssertionError: progress not incremented (before=0, after=0) E assert 0 == (0 + 1)

testcase.name: test_missions_indexes_present

failure.message: AssertionError: missing mission_id unique index. indexes=['_id_'] assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_missions.py:357: in test_missions_indexes_present assert has_mission_id_unique, f"missing mission_id unique index. indexes={list(info.keys())}" E AssertionError: missing mission_id unique index. indexes=['_id_'] E assert False
